name: io.github.asume21/webear
description: Give your AI coding assistant ears — capture, analyze, and describe live audio from any web app's AudioContext. Works with Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, and any MCP-compatible IDE.

environmentVariables.description: URL of your dev server where WebEar middleware is mounted
environmentVariables.name: WEBEAR_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: API key from codedswitch.com for audio analysis
environmentVariables.name: CODEDSWITCH_API_KEY
